---
title: "Page 5 - Activity Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec01-sp05"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec01"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---









## Task

_Clearly define the task or exercise for the learner._

## Instructions

_Provide step-by-step instructions on how to complete the activity._

## Output

_Describe what the learner should produce (e.g. "A paragraph summarizing...", "A spreadsheet with...")._

## Optional self-check

_Provide criteria or questions for the learner to check their own work._

---

## Learning Activities



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide an overview of the sequence or process the learner is about to follow._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.step-sequence}
<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the numbered steps or procedural stages here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or next-step prompt after the sequence._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a short introduction for this quick self-check._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.self-check data-variant="quick"}
**Quick Self-Check**

<!-- editable:start body -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide 2-4 questions for the learner to consider._]

- Question 1
- Question 2
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Reflection guidance**

<!-- editable:start feedback -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a model answer or reflection points._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this guided reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="guided"}
**Personal Reflection**

<!-- editable:start prompt -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide an overview of the sequence or process the learner is about to follow._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.step-sequence}
<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the numbered steps or procedural stages here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or next-step prompt after the sequence._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a short introduction for this quick self-check._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.self-check data-variant="quick"}
**Quick Self-Check**

<!-- editable:start body -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide 2-4 questions for the learner to consider._]

- Question 1
- Question 2
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Reflection guidance**

<!-- editable:start feedback -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a model answer or reflection points._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this guided reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="guided"}
**Personal Reflection**

<!-- editable:start prompt -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec01-sp04.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 4 - Application Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec01-sp06.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 6 - Reflection Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
